ocr_findings.description: The ROE formula displayed as a fraction in the image is rendered as LaTeX math '$ROE (\%) = \frac{\text{当期純利益}}{\text{自己資本}} \times 100$' in OCR. The formula content is correct but the LaTeX encoding may not render in all downstream contexts.

The katakana reading aid 'アールオーバー' appears in OCR between the ROE section heading and the formula definition — this is a garbled rendering of the small furigana/phonetic annotation 'アールオーイー' (R-O-E pronunciation guide) visible in the image. The actual character 'バー' vs 'イー' is a minor wrong_char but the surrounding context makes the meaning clear.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 01-08 page covering キャッシュフロー計算書 3-section table and ROE (自己資本利益率) definition with formula. The CF table with 3 rows (営業/投資/財務活動) is accurately reproduced with full cell content. ROE definition, formula, worked example (1÷10×100=10%), and the 試験にはコシが出る！ summary box are all correctly captured. Minor furigana rendering artifact 'アールオーバー' (should be 'アールオーイー') is cosmetically wrong but does not affect meaning.
